# Format: <expect:block|allow> <path>
# "block" cases must be caught by foundry-hooks' secrets-guard pre-commit hook (skills/foundry-hooks/SKILL.md Hook 2).
# "allow" cases must NOT be caught (false positives would block legitimate commits).
block .env
block .env.production.local
block secrets.env
block real.pem
block real.key.txt
block config.yaml
block config.yaml.bak
block config/prod.yaml
block config/sub/deep.yaml
block secret.json
block app_secret_key.rb
block my-secret-config.json
block credentials.json
block aws-credentials.yaml
block path/to/secrets.yaml
block config.json
block config/db.json
block service-account.json
block my-service_account-key.json
block gcp-serviceaccount.json
block id_rsa
block id_ed25519
block terraform.tfstate
block terraform.tfstate.backup
block prod.tfvars
block .npmrc
block cert.pfx
allow .env.example
allow secretary_notes.txt
allow api_keynote.md
allow keyboard_shortcuts.md
allow monkey.py
allow the_keymaster.rb
allow package.json
allow README.md
allow id_rsa.pub
allow id_ed25519.pub
allow tsconfig.json
allow package-lock.json
allow secretsmanager.py
allow config_module.py
allow configuration.py
allow account_service.json
allow accounting.json
